name: mctl-loyalty
description: Telegram Mini App community loyalty system: dynamic QR check-in, single global points balance, merchant/staff model, rewards & redemptions.

scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.build:landing: cd landing && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && cp src/db/schema.sql dist-test/db/schema.sql && node --test "dist-test/**/*.test.js"
